name: Latency optimization
when_to_use: Sequenced, profile-first reductions to a known-slow path with measured before / after

name: Throughput optimization
when_to_use: Lift throughput ceiling; reduce queueing or coherency overhead

name: Resource optimization
when_to_use: Reduce CPU / memory / IO footprint; target saturation source

name: Tracing optimization
when_to_use: Reduce trace cost (sampling, span volume) without losing diagnose-ability

name: Log optimization
when_to_use: Reduce log volume / cost without losing recovery value

name: Metric optimization
when_to_use: Cut high-cardinality series; keep the questions the dashboard must answer

name: SLO tuning
when_to_use: Adjust SLI / SLO / alert thresholds to reflect user experience without false pages
